title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server, published to npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (langchain-ollama on PyPI) for using Ollama models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’) that works like ChatGPT and supports RAG, plugins, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android support, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, supports streaming and chat.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Experimental Go CLI that wraps Ollama with extra utilities like model search and progress bars.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes and examples for using Ollama with Flask, FastAPI, Next.js, Rust, etc.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration package to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and minimal dependencies.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-cuda
summary: Official CUDA-enabled Docker images for running Ollama on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama API via reqwest.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client for Ollama demonstrating HTTP requests and JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal RAG chatbot example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets users chat with local Ollama models in Discord channels.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete and summarization powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-huggingface-hub
summary: Open PR/discussion to add Hugging Face Hub integration for pulling models directly into Ollama.
